final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial fashion illustration for a deep-sea inspired haute couture evening gown collection.

Style/medium: fashion illustration blended with editorial photography, haute couture runway campaign aesthetic, refined digital painting with photographic textures
Composition: full-length standing pose, front-facing or three-quarter view, studio shot against void backdrop, medium format framing
Subject: floor-length evening gown with cascading multi-layered translucent organza skirt printed with jellyfish tentacle patterns, structured bodice with three-dimensional coral reef embroidery and Swarovski crystal embellishments in blue, green, and violet
Scene/backdrop: pure black void studio environment, no visible props or scenery
Lighting/mood: multi-angle professional stage lighting, dramatic spotlighting emphasizing translucent fabric layers and bioluminescent glow effects, mysterious and luxurious atmosphere
Color palette: deep ocean blue as base, bioluminescent violet as highlight, coral orange as accent, interplay of cool and warm tones
Materials/textures: sheer organza with layered transparency, dimensional embroidery with raised coral textures, faceted crystal surfaces catching light, smooth skin
Avoid: 8K stuffer, generic stock photo feel, flat lighting, cluttered background, amateur fashion sketch aesthetic
